text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, April 21. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and pediatrician checkup for Lily.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Managing some allergy issues today. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. Great consistency with running. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need scheduling portal immediately. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's break this down. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need billing integration immediately. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! Great update. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I can run some projections for you. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Managing some allergy issues today. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. That's good medical feedback. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. That sounds like a sweet moment. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Here is what I recommend. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We have a conflict about whether to prioritize security or speed for the launch. I think we need a compromise before we commit.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I checked the recent logs for that. Security must come first for patient data. We can cite HIPAA standards to Greg to resolve the dispute. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. I'm proud of his curiosity.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! He is doing so well. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that looking over our mortgage options. We are comparing school districts in Frisco to find the best neighborhood. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Refinancing is a great leverage point. Liberty Elementary has excellent reviews. The neighborhood near it is highly recommended. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Busy day at Vertex Health. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ethan did great with his school homework. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
